evals.prompt: Help me think through a governance doc for state release communications.
evals.expected_behavior: Facilitate a dialog, ask focused questions, use targeted Knowledge Store lookup if relevant, and produce a concept packet rather than a final document.

evals.prompt: We need a CCB policy but I’m not sure what decisions are missing.
evals.expected_behavior: Identify missing decisions, separate assumptions from requirements, and develop the operating model interactively.

evals.prompt: Develop the operating model before drafting the governance doc.
evals.expected_behavior: Run the upstream governance development workflow and end with a chat-only concept packet.

evals.prompt: Pressure-test this ATO governance idea against what we already know about Emmy controls.
evals.expected_behavior: Use targeted Knowledge Store or Confluence reads, cite relevant findings, and surface risks or gaps.

evals.prompt: Draft the final governance document for this completed process.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-governance-doc-draft because the user wants the final governance document.

evals.prompt: Review this existing governance document for approval readiness.
evals.expected_behavior: Use emmy-governance-doc-review because the user wants assessment of an existing document.
